description: UserAuditConfig is the Schema for the userauditconfigs API

apiVersion.description:
APIVersion defines the versioned schema of this representation of an object.
Servers should convert recognized schemas to the latest internal value, and
may reject unrecognized values.
More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#resources

kind.description:
Kind is a string value representing the REST resource this object represents.
Servers may infer this from the endpoint the client submits requests to.
Cannot be updated.
In CamelCase.
More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#types-kinds

spec.description: UserAuditConfigSpec defines the desired state of UserAuditConfig
spec.title: Specification

pollIntervalSeconds.description: PollIntervalSeconds is how often (in seconds) the controller polls for new events.

retentionMonths.description: RetentionMonths is how many months of logs to keep. 0 means unlimited.

status.description: UserAuditConfigStatus defines the observed state of UserAuditConfig
status.title: Status

health.description: Health is the overall health: ok, degraded, or error.

kcEventsProcessed.description: KcEventsProcessed is the total KC events since the controller started.

lastPollTime.description: LastPollTime is the timestamp of the last completed poll cycle.

lastTransactionId.description: LastTransactionID is the watermark -- highest transaction ID processed.

lastUserEventMs.description: LastUserEventMs is the KC event watermark (epoch milliseconds).

logFiles.description: LogFiles lists the log files currently on disk.

items.description: LogFileInfo describes a single log file on disk.

name.description: Name is the log file name.

sizeBytes.description: SizeBytes is the file size in bytes.

message.description: Message is a human-readable explanation of the current health state.

subsystems.description: Subsystems reports the health of each data source.

edaApi.description: EdaApi is the health of the EDA API connection.

keycloakEvents.description: KeycloakEvents is the health of the Keycloak events connection.

transactionsProcessed.description: TransactionsProcessed is the total count since the controller started.

version.description: Version is the controller version string.
